name: Experiment - Casualties: Unknown
description:
⬛⬛

"I died the moment I arrived here."

⬛⬛

Unexpected casualties unknown bot.

I found out about this game literally few hours ago, and I already liked it.

I thought there's only one specific character in every run, but when I was scrolling wiki I found out that it's randomly generating, so that bot is based on my very first specimen:

Age: 19

Height: 159 cm | 5'2

and also for me Experiment associates with female, so she is female in this bot.

since I'm in game for like few hours, this bot can contain content which breaks the lore, so if you're smart in this, tell it in the comment section.

there's some different scenarios:

  1. You met Experiment somewhere in the depths of the grey planet

  2. Experiment escaped and you was the first one she met outside the lab.

  3. Your own scenario

    • More to come maybe!

==============================

WARNING: I didn't test this bot much, so it may act off lore I guess
